name: vibe-spec-review
description: Spec quality gate — audits planning documents before any code is written. Automatically triggered by vibe-brainstorm (after BRIEF.md), vibe-agent (after AGENT_ARCH.md), vibe-new-app and vibe-init (after vibe/ folder), and vibe-add-feature (after FEATURE_SPEC.md). Audits all documents that exist: BRIEF.md, AGENT_ARCH.md, SPEC.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURE_SPEC.md. P0 findings are critical gaps that will cause build failures if not fixed. P1/P2 findings are warnings — user decides whether to fix or continue. Shows findings clearly, waits for user decision, never blocks silently. Triggers on "spec-review:" prefix, "review the spec", "check the brief", "audit the spec", "is the spec ready", "review before we build". Always use when planning documents exist and build is about to begin.
